summary: Blog post by Carole Herder arguing that Cavallo hoof boots are better than homemade duct-tape bandages for holding poultices and dressings in place while protecting an injured or diseased hoof.
Carole Herder blog post on good horsemanship, encouraging riders to ask questions and trust intuition to improve their horse's well-being, hooves, diet and riding.
Story about Rainier Therapeutic Riding in Yelm, WA, a PATH center serving military veterans with PTSD/TBI, going barefoot and booted with Cavallo boots on its therapy horses.
Earth Day reflective essay by Carole Herder on watching her horses move through the summer landscape and concern for their increasingly vulnerable natural environment.
Blog post on why correct riding posture matters for horse comfort, listing short-term signs of discomfort (knocking jumps, not tracking up, not collecting, not bending) and long-term muscle effects.
First-anniversary post celebrating the Cavallo Trek hoof boot, sharing customer testimonials about durability, the slim option, and replaceable Velcro straps on barefoot/booted trail horses.
Educational post on navicular and barefoot performance, explaining how the natural hoof spreads and absorbs shock and questioning how nailed-on metal shoes impair that function.
Reflective essay by Carole Herder on rhythm in nature and riding, encouraging riders to connect with their horse's natural cadence rather than forcing control.
Customer testimonial from Shari Lariviere, Ontario, praising Cavallo boots for comfortable, hesitation-free riding on stony, rocky and gravelly forest terrain.
Customer testimonial from Shari in Ontario whose quarter horse Nougat rides comfortably through rocks, muck and water in Cavallo boots and lifts his leg to be booted.
Product announcement introducing Slim and Regular sole options across Cavallo's Trek, Sport and Simple hoof boots, detailing sole features, tread, breakover and materials for each style.
Carole Herder post announcing Cavallo's partnership to offer Natural Solutions' Natural Stride joint and arthritis supplement for horses and dogs.
